vocab.meaning: nền tảng/phần cốt yếu của cái gì
vocab.example: Team sports are widely considered a cornerstone of our national identity, reflecting our collective values.

vocab.meaning: đỉnh điểm của sự phấn khích
vocab.example: The atmosphere in the city usually reaches a climax of excitement during the final match of the regional football cup.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy tình đồng chí/tình bạn thân thiết
vocab.example: Many companies organize volleyball matches because they are effective tools to foster camaraderie among employees.

vocab.meaning: xu thế/tinh thần đặc trưng của thời đại và văn hóa
vocab.example: The obsession with basketball has become part of the modern cultural zeitgeist for the younger generation in my country.

vocab.meaning: sự trung thành kiên định/không lay chuyển
vocab.example: Fans often demonstrate unwavering loyalty to their local teams, regardless of their performance on the field.
Competitive group sports are woven into the social fabric of our communities, acting as a bridge between generations.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua mọi ranh giới (ngôn ngữ, địa vị...)
vocab.example: Football is a universal language in our culture that manages to transcend social and economic boundaries.

vocab.meaning: một môn thể thao thu hút đông người xem
vocab.example: While many enjoy playing, basketball is primarily a major spectator sport that draws thousands to the stadiums.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm cực kỳ phấn khích/vui sướng
vocab.example: Witnessing the national team score a last-minute goal is an exhilarating experience that stays with you for years.

vocab.meaning: câu chuyện về kẻ yếu thế lội ngược dòng
vocab.example: Our culture loves the underdog story, where a small regional team triumphs against all odds in a national tournament.
